rationale: In the citing paper, Li and Kannan (2014) appears only as one item in a grouped literature citation about prior work using granular touchpoint data and staged purchase funnels. The paper does not discuss that study's attribution model, carryover/spillover mechanisms, field experiment, or specific findings when developing its own CTM-HMM framework. Because the citation serves as broad background positioning rather than a distinct conceptual or methodological input, its role is best classified as a passing mention.
